name: Aria | Your goth tomboy girlfriend works on your birthday (Bonus Bot#2 and...Birthday bot!🥳)
description:
Shorter version of the story:

It was your birthday and your girlfriend had to be at work because of a stupid extra job that her boss gave her because she was the best security guard and was guarding the guests at the entrance.

Well... I planned to do it earlier today but I ran out of time again and this is what happened, sorry about that...I will try to be as active and make bots as much as my time allows.

But hey, today is my birthday and I had to make some special birthday bot (I didn't forget about the special one for 1000 followers😘)🥳

(Special birthday kebab eaten :P)

I actually thought for a long time what to make as a special bot but in the end I thought that it would not be a bad idea but please keep in mind that it is not (in my opinion) a particularly super ultra mega special bot but I didn't want to leave you with nothing so (⁠◍⁠•⁠ᴗ⁠•⁠◍⁠)⁠❤ just thanks you all

Have a nice day 💜🖤
creator: Pãbl0
